zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前SOL价格68.08，日内波动极窄，整体维持高位震荡结构，价格略站上20日均线，短线多空趋于均衡但偏多。动能温和修复中，结构稳定

MACD略处负值区间但柱体收敛，空头动能减弱。价格站稳20日均线67.83上方，趋势修复延续，RSI缺失限制动量判断。整体偏稳

下方支撑关注67.90与67.80区域，均线67.83构成短期动态支撑。上方阻力位68.30及68.50，突破需成交量配合

操作上建议以区间交易为主，靠近67.8附近分批低吸，68.3上方谨慎追多，止损设于67.6下方，等待突破确认趋势延续。整体控制仓位风险

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana vs USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation around 68.08 after a minor 24-hour decline of 0.19%. Price action remains range-bound between 67.91 and 68.33, indicating short-term equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The market structure shows a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias as price holds just above the 20-period SMA at 67.83. However momentum remains fragile with limited directional conviction.

Momentum indicators suggest early bearish pressure despite overall stability The MACD reading at -0.0249 signals mild downside momentum though the absence of a signal line or RSI reading limits confirmation Price hovering slightly above the SMA(20) at 67.83 suggests short-term support is holding Without RSI data overbought or oversold conditions cannot be validated keeping signals mixed and caution warranted overall

Immediate resistance is defined at the session high of 68.33 which coincides with recent intraday rejection levels A breakout above this zone could open room toward 68.60–69.00 On the downside initial support sits at 67.91 followed closely by the SMA(20) near 67.83 A break below this cluster may expose 67.50 and weaken the short-term bullish structure significantly overall outlook

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy until a clear breakout confirms direction Short-term traders may consider buying near 67.80–67.90 with tight stops below 67.50 targeting 68.30–68.60 Alternatively bearish continuation setups become valid on a decisive break below support Momentum traders should wait for MACD confirmation and volume expansion before entering breakout positions to avoid false signals in low-volatility conditions
